summary: Added docs/project-facts.md as the canonical source for project facts.
agent_facing_impact: Agents have one source for project name, version, DOI, license, repository URL, CLI commands, integrations, and boundaries.
verification: Metadata parsing and pytest are run in this PR wave.
evidence_integrity_impact: Reduces drift between docs, metadata, and callable-surface claims.
next_action: Keep docs/project-facts.md updated when project facts change.

summary: Added agent-facing discovery guidance in AGENTS.md, llms.txt, and docs/for-agents.md.
agent_facing_impact: External agents can decide when to use or avoid the project and how to validate outputs.
verification: pytest -q and metadata validation are run in this PR wave.
evidence_integrity_impact: Improves correct use of validators, exports, and claim boundaries.
next_action: Keep discovery files aligned with docs/project-facts.md.

summary: Added citation, CodeMeta, attribution, and recommendation policy files.
agent_facing_impact: Agents can cite and attribute the project without inventing metadata or promotion mechanics.
verification: CITATION.cff parses as YAML and codemeta.json parses as JSON.
evidence_integrity_impact: Makes derived-work attribution explicit and auditable.
next_action: Update citation metadata when DOI, version, or author metadata changes.

summary: Added development ledger, PR template, and metadata validation CI.
agent_facing_impact: Agents and reviewers get machine-checkable discovery and policy invariants.
verification: Local metadata script and GitHub Actions workflow validate discovery and policy files.
evidence_integrity_impact: Preserves metadata integrity and claim-boundary discipline.
next_action: Extend checks when callable surfaces change.

summary: Add structured agent-evidence capabilities --json output and callable-surface docs.
agent_facing_impact: Agents can inspect current capabilities without scraping README prose.
verification: agent-evidence capabilities --json parses as JSON and pytest -q covers required keys.
evidence_integrity_impact: Keeps wrappers and external agents aligned with implemented surfaces.
next_action: Keep OpenAPI and MCP unavailable until real wrappers exist.

summary: Normalized LangChain, OpenAI Agents, and CrewAI integration terminology around the agent-native discovery layer.
agent_facing_impact: Agents reading integration docs see the same runtime evidence exporter boundary as AGENTS.md and llms.txt.
verification: pytest -q, targeted integration terminology checks, agent-evidence capabilities --json parsing, and ruff.
evidence_integrity_impact: Reduces drift between example integrations and canonical evidence/export boundaries.
next_action: Keep integration docs aligned when maturity or callable surfaces change.

summary: Added generated agent-index.json, llms-full.txt, schema, generation scripts, and drift tests.
agent_facing_impact: Agents get deterministic machine-readable and expanded LLM-readable metadata derived from existing project facts and capabilities.
verification: pytest -q, generation --check commands, schema validation, metadata validation, capabilities JSON parsing, and ruff.
evidence_integrity_impact: Reduces metadata drift across project facts, citation metadata, policy files, and callable-surface metadata.
next_action: Keep generated metadata checked whenever facts, policy, citation, or callable surfaces change.

summary: Added a stdlib local OpenAPI wrapper with agent-evidence serve, health, capabilities, profile validation, and bundle verification endpoints.
agent_facing_impact: Agents can call a local HTTP wrapper while CLI/core behavior remains canonical.
verification: pytest -q, agent-evidence capabilities --json parsing, generation --check commands, OpenAPI contract tests, local API tests, and ruff.
evidence_integrity_impact: Keeps callable HTTP access aligned with existing validation and verification logic without changing evidence semantics.
next_action: MCP remains unavailable; no telemetry, auth system, hosted mode, or Review Pack endpoint was added.

summary: Added a local stdio MCP wrapper with read-only / verify-first tools and fixed read-only resources.
agent_facing_impact: Agents can inspect capabilities, schemas, docs, citation policy, and run validation or verification through MCP without new evidence semantics.
verification: pytest -q, MCP boundary tests, agent-evidence capabilities --json parsing, generation --check commands, and ruff.
evidence_integrity_impact: Keeps MCP aligned with existing CLI/core validation and verification paths.
next_action: Keep MCP local stdio only; do not add telemetry, registry publication, prompts, write tools, or Review Pack tools without a separate plan.
